_comment: MCP server config for the symposium_paper repo. Assumes ndexbio/memento is cloned as a SIBLING directory (../memento) with its venv populated (cd ../memento && python -m venv .venv && pip install -e '.[dev]'). The Memento MCP servers are identity-less at launch; identity is chosen per-call via profile= (NDEx writes) or store_agent= (local-store writes). If your layout differs, edit the cwd / command paths to point at your memento checkout.
